meta.name: DPR AI — signature motion tokens
meta.consumed_by: assets/home.js (fetched at runtime, validated against caps, re-asserted as CSS vars)
meta.note: Motion is event/scroll/reduced-motion driven. No hardcoded wall-clock timers drive behavior; the only periods below are ambient rAF drift/pulse cycles.

node_period_seconds.desc: Ambient drift/pulse period for a hero flywheel node.

pulse_period_seconds.desc: Ambient pulse period for the relationship-flywheel ring stations.

hover_transition_ms.desc: Ease-out duration for a single node hover lift.

hover_lift_pct.desc: Max scale a hovered/focused node may lift (<=15%).

parallax_max_px.desc: Max pointer/scroll parallax offset for hero layers (<=20px).

edge_draw_ms.desc: Stroke-dashoffset draw time for a cross-cluster edge when scrolled into view.

reduced_motion.description: Nodes at layout-default, edges 100% drawn, glow pinned 8px/15%, wash pinned 3%, zero drift/parallax; instant opacity/color hover feedback only.
